overview: Ocelot Pride Midrange is a white-red Legacy deck that blends efficient creature plays with combat trick manipulation to control the board and close games. By leveraging signature threats like Ocelot Pride and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah alongside Voice of Victory, the deck applies steady pressure while retaining the flexibility to answer opponent's key pieces. Success relies on reading the matchup, holding up combat tricks for maximum impact, and transitioning smoothly from early aggression to late-game value generation.
win_conditions: Overwhelm opponents with efficient 1/1 and 2/2 creatures on curve
Close games using Voice of Victory combat tricks to swing for lethal
Stabilize and outvalue opponents with Ajani, Nacatl Pariah's life gain and combat pumping
Maintain board presence through Ocelot Pride's static buffs and activated value

keep_criteria: Hands with two lands and a playable creature or combat trick
Hands containing Ocelot Pride or Voice of Victory
Hands with early interaction or curve-smoothing spells
mulligan_criteria: Hands with three or more lands
Hands lacking early creatures or spells to play turns 1-2
Hands consisting only of late-game threats like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah

early_game: Play lands and small creatures strictly on curve to establish presence
Hold Voice of Victory until combat to maximize surprise value and damage
Avoid unnecessary trades while preserving combat tricks for key moments
mid_game: Deploy Ocelot Pride to generate board control and buff your Cat synergies
Apply steady pressure to force unfavorable trades from the opponent
Use combat tricks to protect key attackers or enable surprise swings
late_game: Bring in Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to stabilize, gain life, and close games
Leverage Ocelot Pride's activated abilities to outvalue opponent's resources
Sequence combat tricks to bypass protection spells and secure lethal damage

key_cards.name: Ocelot Pride
key_cards.notes: Use its static ability to buff other Cats and its activated ability to pump itself or generate value, keeping the board clear for your attackers.

key_cards.name: Voice of Victory
key_cards.notes: Hold up for combat to pump creatures, enable surprise damage, or protect key blockers from removal.

key_cards.name: Ajani, Nacatl Pariah
key_cards.notes: Deploy when you have a board presence to generate massive combat damage and life gain, securing the win against control or combo decks.

sequencing_tips: Hold Voice of Victory until combat to maximize surprise value and bypass protection spells
Prioritize playing Ocelot Pride before committing to all-in attacks to maintain board resilience
Save combat tricks for opponent's key threats rather than using them on curve
Sequence Ajani, Nacatl Pariah's activation after opponent's removal window has passed

matchups.advice: Play efficiently and use Voice of Victory to swing for lethal or protect key blockers.
Apply steady pressure with creatures and use Ocelot Pride to generate value around their sweepers.
Disrupt their casting sequence with early pressure and combat tricks, avoiding unnecessary trades.
